issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description:
In YARN-4946, we've been discussing a revert due to the potential for keeping more applications in the state store than desired, and the potential to greatly increase RM recovery times.

 

I'm in favor of reverting the patch, but other ideas along the lines of YARN-9571 would work as well.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Application may be leaked in state store when resourcemanager failover.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

fields.summary: RM should not consider an application as COMPLETED when log aggregation is not in a terminal state

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

comments.body:
Attached a patch which reverts YARN-4946 on trunk. The revert applied cleanly to the logic in {{RMAppManager}}, but had several conflicts in {{TestAppManager}}.

Tagging [~ccondit], [~wangda], [~rkanter], [~snemeth]
+1 for revert and +1 for making this a 3.3.0 blocker. I think we should this revert it in a 3.2 maintenance release too.
[~Steven Rand] can you please upload the patch,As this is blocker to 3.3.0 release.
[~Steven Rand], I can help in reviewing this today. Thanks.

From trying to apply the patch locally, it seems that trunk has changed since I wrote it, and it no longer applies cleanly. I'll upload a new one soon.

EDIT: The {{YARN-9848.003.patch}} file accounts for the changes from YARN-9886 and applies to trunk.

+1, the revert looks good to me.
Hi [~sunilg], would you check this?
Yes, I was waiting for the jenkins earlier. Checking now.

Looks good to me. I ll commit this tomorrow if there are no objections.

cc [~snemeth] ICYMI
Sorry for chiming in a bit late. Fine to revert by me.
Thanks all. I also have a patch for branch-3.2 so that we can include it in a 3.2 maintenance release like [~vinodkv] suggested. Do I upload the patch to this JIRA, or is it better to make a new one?
[~Steven Rand], can you raise the seperate Jira for branch-3.2 ..? and resolve this issue..?

I created YARN-10244 for branch-3.2.

For resolving this issue, I'm not a committer, so I think someone else will have to merge the patch to trunk and branch-3.3.0.
Committed to trunk, branch-3.3, and branch-3.3.0. Thank you [~Steven Rand], [~sunilg], and [~snemeth].

SUCCESS: Integrated in Jenkins build Hadoop-trunk-Commit #18191 (See [https://builds.apache.org/job/Hadoop-trunk-Commit/18191/])
YARN-9848. Revert YARN-4946. Contributed by Steven Rand. (aajisaka: rev 6ef01646ba9540248ffaf322f4678fbdac28fcd4)
* (edit) hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-resourcemanager/src/main/java/org/apache/hadoop/yarn/server/resourcemanager/rmapp/RMApp.java

* (edit) hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-resourcemanager/src/main/java/org/apache/hadoop/yarn/server/resourcemanager/rmapp/RMAppImpl.java
* (edit) hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-resourcemanager/src/test/java/org/apache/hadoop/yarn/server/resourcemanager/applicationsmanager/MockAsm.java
* (edit) hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-resourcemanager/src/test/java/org/apache/hadoop/yarn/server/resourcemanager/rmapp/MockRMApp.java
* (edit) hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-resourcemanager/src/test/java/org/apache/hadoop/yarn/server/resourcemanager/AppManagerTestBase.java
* (edit) hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-resourcemanager/src/test/java/org/apache/hadoop/yarn/server/resourcemanager/TestAppManager.java
Backported the revert commit into branch-3.2.

Thanks [~aajisaka], This approach is much better now. 

Thank you.
